seo.title: SA Film Academy 360 Marketing Strategy
seo.description: The 2026 to 2027 360 marketing strategy for the SA Film Academy.

hero.headline: SA Film Academy
hero.subheadline: Talent Pipeline of the South African Screen
hero.altText: Professional Black South African film crew on a cinematic movie set

fields.label: Opening summary
fields.value: The SA Film Academy strategy translates two decades of training, placement and industry trust into a visible, measurable and commercially resilient growth engine.

metrics.label: Investment
metrics.description: Invested in skills development and in-service training since 2006.

metrics.label: Trainees
metrics.description: Placed into professional film and digital media production roles.

metrics.label: Driving Licences
metrics.description: Granted free through the FILMGRO pathway.
